entries.title: 2.5L Diesel
entries.history: Common rail diesel replacing mechanical units; most searched Pick Up engine in UK.

commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner failure (OEM 15200-7S000) at 80k-120k miles
Injector seal leaks causing diesel in oil

commonProblems.h2: Nissan Pick Up Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Nissan Pick Up's diesel engines dominate UK replacement demand, with the YD25DDT timing chain and ZD30DDT fuel system failures most frequently reported. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use this section to compare repair vs replacement costs and make the right decision for your Pick Up.

problems.group: Nissan Pick Up Timing Chain Failure
problems.h4: Nissan Pick Up Timing Chain Failure - Why YD25DDT Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Pick Up D22 Double Cab, D22 King Cab, D40 Navara (2002-2015, YD25DDT)
problems.rootCause: Factory tensioner (OEM 15200-7S000) loses pressure, allowing chain slap that damages guides and can jump timing.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace tensioner, guides, chain before failure
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught early via rattling noise or P0011 code

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt YD25DDT with upgraded tensioner, new turbo, bench tested
repairOptions.longevity: 12-month warranty; recommended once chain has jumped or caused damage

problems.recommendation: If you hear chain rattle or get P0011 codes, act immediately - preventative replacement is far cheaper than fixing a jumped timing engine. Once damage has occurred, a rebuilt YD25DDT with upgraded tensioner (15200-7S000) is the only reliable long-term solution.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt YD25DDT engine prices for your Nissan Pick Up

problems.h4: Nissan Pick Up Turbo Failure - YD25DDT & ZD30DDT Oil Starvation Issues
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Pick Up D22, D40 Navara (2002-2015, YD25DDT/ZD30DDT)
problems.rootCause: Oil starvation from clogged return lines, worn seals, or infrequent oil changes damages turbo bearings and seals.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace turbocharger (OEM 14500-75F0A), clean oil lines, new gaskets
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if engine not contaminated with turbo debris

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine with Upgraded Turbo
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded turbo internals, new oil pump, full flush
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if oil contamination occurred; includes 12-month warranty

problems.recommendation: If blue smoke and power loss appear but the engine still runs smoothly, turbo-only replacement may suffice. However, if metal debris entered the engine, a rebuilt unit with upgraded turbo is the only safe option to avoid repeat failure.
problems.cta: Get quotes for YD25DDT/ZD30DDT Nissan Pick Up engine replacement

problems.h4: Nissan Pick Up HPFP Failure - ZD30DDT Fuel System Catastrophe
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Pick Up D40 Navara 3.0 dCi (2005-2011, ZD30DDT)
problems.rootCause: High-pressure fuel pump (OEM 15610-7S000) internal wear sends metal debris through common rail, destroying injectors and potentially scoring cylinder walls.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace HPFP, all injectors, flush fuel system, new filters
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable if caught before metal debris damaged engine internals

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine with Upgraded Fuel System
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt ZD30DDT with upgraded HPFP, new injectors, full system flush
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended once metal contamination suspected; includes 12-month warranty

problems.recommendation: HPFP failure on the ZD30DDT almost always requires full engine replacement due to metal contamination risk. If you experience hard starting, power loss, or metallic knocking, get a compression test immediately - if results are poor, a rebuilt engine is the only reliable path forward.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt ZD30DDT engine prices for your Nissan Pick Up

problems.group: Nissan Pick Up Head Gasket Failure
problems.h4: Nissan Pick Up Head Gasket Failure - TD27T Overheating Issues
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Pick Up D21 Hardbody 2.7 TD (1986-1997, TD27T)
problems.rootCause: Age-related gasket degradation combined with cooling system neglect leads to coolant-oil mixing and overheating.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove cylinder head, replace gasket (OEM 15100-7S000), skim head if warped, new bolts
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if head not warped and no bearing damage from overheating

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine with Upgraded Gasket
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt TD27T with upgraded multi-layer gasket, new water pump, full cooling system service
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if head warped or bearings damaged; includes 12-month warranty

problems.recommendation: The TD27T is a robust mechanical engine - if caught early with only gasket failure, a head gasket replacement offers excellent value. However, if overheating caused warping or bearing damage, a rebuilt engine with upgraded gasket is the safer long-term investment.
problems.cta: Get quotes for TD27T Nissan Pick Up engine replacement

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Nissan Pick Up
finalCta.paragraph: Engine problems don't have to mean scrapping your Pick Up. EngineMarket connects you with trusted UK specialists who supply rebuilt and reconditioned engines with upgraded components addressing the original failure point. Compare prices from multiple suppliers, choose supply-only or full supply & fit, and get back on the road with a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty - all without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Nissan Pick Up Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Nissan Pick Up and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

items.title: Nissan Pick Up 2.2L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.2L YD22DDT was the entry-level common rail diesel for the D22 Pick Up, offering adequate power for light commercial use with better fuel economy than the larger 2.5L unit. Most commonly found in King Cab variants from 2001-2008.
items.cta: Get quotes for Nissan Pick Up 2.2L diesel engines

items.title: Nissan Pick Up 2.5L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.5L YD25DDT is the backbone of the Nissan Pick Up diesel range, fitted across D22 and D40 generations from 2002-2015. Most searched engine for replacement due to timing chain tensioner failure patterns, but offers strong torque and reliability when maintained.
items.cta: Get quotes for Nissan Pick Up 2.5L diesel engines

items.title: Nissan Pick Up 2.7L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.7L TD27T is the robust mechanical injection diesel from the D21 Hardbody era, prized for simplicity and durability. Head gasket issues are the primary concern on higher-mileage examples, but the design is otherwise straightforward to maintain.
items.cta: Get quotes for Nissan Pick Up 2.7L diesel engines

items.title: Nissan Pick Up 3.0L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 3.0L ZD30DDT powered the D40 Navara as the larger displacement diesel option, offering strong torque for towing. High-pressure fuel pump failures after 100k miles are the dominant replacement driver for this engine code.
items.cta: Get quotes for Nissan Pick Up 3.0L diesel engines

groups.title: Nissan Pick Up Petrol Engine Sizes

items.title: Nissan Pick Up 2.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.0L QR20DE provided a simpler petrol alternative to diesel in the D22 Pick Up, with adequate power for lighter duties. Timing chain tensioner wear is the most common issue on higher-mileage examples.
items.cta: Compare Nissan Pick Up 2.0L petrol engine prices

items.title: Nissan Pick Up 2.4L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.4L KA24E SOHC petrol powered the D21 Hardbody, available in carburettor or EFI forms depending on year. A robust, simple design with few major failure points beyond age-related wear.
items.cta: Compare Nissan Pick Up 2.4L petrol engine prices

items.title: Nissan Pick Up 2.5L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.5L QR25DE appeared in the D40 Navara as a petrol option, offering smooth power delivery but less common than diesel in the UK market. Variable valve timing component wear is the primary concern.
items.cta: Compare Nissan Pick Up 2.5L petrol engine prices

items.title: Nissan Pick Up 3.5L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 3.5L VQ35DE V6 was the performance petrol option for the D22 Pick Up, offering strong power but rare in the UK market. Timing chain rail failures are the most documented issue.
commonFailurePoints: oil consumption from valve stem seals
items.cta: Compare Nissan Pick Up 3.5L petrol engine prices

items.title: Nissan Pick Up 1.6L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 1.6L B4D petrol powers the NP200 half-ton pick-up, shared with Renault Clio/Micra platforms. An affordable, simple engine with timing chain and oil consumption issues at higher mileage. Not sure which engine size your Nissan Pick Up needs? fuelTypes.h2: Nissan Pick Up Engines by Fuel Type

items.title: Nissan Pick Up Diesel Engines
items.description: Diesel engines dominated the Nissan Pick Up range across D21, D22 and D40 generations (1986-2015), with the YD25DDT 2.5L unit generating the highest UK replacement demand due to timing chain tensioner failure patterns.
items.descriptor: Diesel engines dominated the Nissan Pick Up range across D21, D22 and D40 generations (1986-2015), with the YD25DDT 2.5L unit generating the highest UK replacement demand due to timing chain tensioner failure patterns.
items.familiesLabel: Common Nissan Pick Up Diesel Engine Families
families: YD25DDT - most common replacement engine (D22/D40), timing chain tensioner risk
YD22DDT - D22 entry diesel, fuel pump (15001-75F0A) failure common
ZD30DDT - D40 Navara 3.0L, HPFP failure after 100k miles
TD27T - D21 mechanical diesel, robust but head gasket issues
knownFor: Strong motorway fuel economy on YD25DDT units
Timing chain tensioner failures on YD25DDT between 80k-120k miles
HPFP contamination risk on ZD30DDT after 100k miles
High UK replacement demand on D22/D40 diesel variants

items.title: Nissan Pick Up Petrol Engines
items.description: Petrol engines offered simpler, lower-cost alternatives across Pick Up generations, with QR and KA series units most common in UK market replacements.
items.descriptor: Petrol engines offered simpler, lower-cost alternatives across Pick Up generations, with QR and KA series units most common in UK market replacements.
items.familiesLabel: Common Nissan Pick Up Petrol Engine Families
families: QR20DE - D22 2.0L petrol, timing chain tensioner wear common
QR25DE - D40 2.5L petrol, VVT component wear at mileage
KA24E - D21 2.4L SOHC, robust but age-related wear
VQ35DE - D22 3.5L V6, rare but timing chain rail issues

engineYears.h2: Nissan Pick Up Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Nissan Pick Up production history, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt engine prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The D21 Hardbody launched Nissan's modern pick-up era with robust mechanical diesel and simple petrol options.
keyChanges: D21 platform introduced with ladder-frame chassis
TD27T mechanical turbodiesel and KA24E petrol engines launched
Single Cab and King Cab body styles available
knownFor: Robust mechanical injection design on TD27T
Head gasket issues on higher-mileage D21 units
Simple, repairable engineering favoured by off-road enthusiasts
Age-related wear now primary concern for surviving examples
years.cta: Get quotes for 1986-1990 Nissan Pick Up replacement engines
years.ticker: Nissan Pick Up D21 engine replacement • TD27T head gasket failure • D21 2.7 diesel rebuild cost
enquiries: Nissan Pick Up D21 engine replacement

years.description: The D22 replaced the D21 with updated styling, improved refinement and new engine options for UK buyers.
keyChanges: D22 platform launched with modernised cabin and chassis
2.5L TD and 2.4L petrol engines introduced for UK market
Double Cab body style added alongside Single/King Cab
knownFor: Improved refinement over D21 while retaining rugged capability
Early D22 units still used TD27T before common rail introduction
Strong residual values for well-maintained examples
Age now primary factor in replacement decisions
years.cta: Get quotes for 1997-2000 Nissan Pick Up replacement engines

years.description: The 2001 facelift introduced common rail diesel technology to the Pick Up range, transforming performance and efficiency.
keyChanges: YD25DDT 2.5L common rail diesel introduced in 2002
QR20DE 2.0L petrol added to D22 lineup
knownFor: YD25DDT became most searched Pick Up engine for replacement
Timing chain tensioner failure patterns emerged on YD25 units
Fuel pump issues documented on YD22DDT applications
Strong commercial fleet adoption of common rail diesels
years.cta: Get quotes for 2001-2004 Nissan Pick Up replacement engines
years.ticker: Nissan Pick Up YD25DDT timing chain • D22 2.2 dCi fuel pump failure • YD25 engine replacement cost
enquiries: Nissan Pick Up YD25DDT timing chain

years.description: The D40 Navara arrived alongside continuing D22 production, offering updated styling, emissions compliance and new engine options.
keyChanges: D40 Navara platform launched with YD25DDT and ZD30DDT engines
D22 continued in parallel with YD25DDT as primary engine
NP200 half-ton pick-up launched in 2008 with 1.6L petrol
knownFor: YD25DDT timing chain issues continued across both platforms
ZD30DDT HPFP failures emerged as key replacement driver
D40 ECU programming differs from D22 - not directly swappable
NP200 established affordable commercial pick-up segment
years.cta: Get quotes for 2005-2010 Nissan Pick Up replacement engines
years.ticker: D40 Navara YD25 engine swap • ZD30DDT HPFP replacement cost • NP200 1.6 engine availability

years.description: Final years of D22 production in select markets while D40 Navara matured with emissions updates and minor refinements.
keyChanges: D22 final production ended in most markets by 2010
D40 Navara received emissions updates for Euro 5 compliance
NP200 continued as affordable half-ton option
knownFor: Later D40 units benefited from minor YD25 tensioner improvements
ZD30DDT HPFP issues remained primary concern for 3.0L models
NP200 established strong reputation for affordability
High-mileage commercial examples now entering replacement phase

years.description: The NP200 remains in production as Nissan's entry-level commercial pick-up, using the proven 1.6L petrol engine.
keyChanges: NP200 continues with minor updates and trim revisions
No new full-size Pick Up variants launched in UK market
Focus on affordability and commercial fleet applications
knownFor: Simple, affordable engineering suited to commercial use
Timing chain and oil consumption issues at higher mileage
Strong parts availability via Renault alliance
Excellent condition examples available for replacement sourcing

faq.h2: Nissan Pick Up Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: Is it worth replacing a Nissan Pick Up engine?
items.answer: Yes, for most commercial and off-road Pick Up owners. Engine replacement from £1,200 (used) to £4,600 (rebuilt) is typically far cheaper than buying a replacement vehicle, especially for D22/D40 models valued £3,000-£10,000+.
keyPoints: Rebuilt YD25DDT engines cost £3,800-£4,200 with 12-month warranty
Commercial uptime makes replacement more economical than vehicle purchase
D21/D22 models under £5,000 value still justify engine investment
Supply & fit packages minimise downtime for fleet operators
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Nissan Pick Up engine prices for your variant

items.question: How much does a Nissan Pick Up engine replacement cost?
items.answer: Typical UK rebuilt engine prices range from £1,800 (YD22DDT) to £4,600 (ZD30DDT), with supply & fit adding £400-£800 labour. Used engines start from £800 but carry higher risk.
keyPoints: YD25DDT rebuilt: £3,800-£4,200 supply only
ZD30DDT rebuilt: £4,000-£4,600 supply only
TD27T rebuilt: £2,600-£3,000 supply only
Labour typically £400-£700 depending on variant complexity

items.question: How long does Nissan Pick Up engine replacement take?
items.answer: Typical replacement takes 2-3 days for YD25DDT engines, with D40 Navara potentially requiring longer due to emissions system complexity. Mobile fitting can reduce vehicle downtime for commercial operators.

D40 Navara may require 3-4 days due to emissions systems
Mobile fitting available nationwide for commercial vehicles
Rebuilt engines may require 3-5 days lead time for custom specs
items.cta: Check Nissan Pick Up engine supply & fit availability

items.question: Does a Nissan Pick Up replacement engine come with warranty?
items.answer: Yes - rebuilt and reconditioned engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty. Used engines typically carry 3-6 month coverage.
keyPoints: 12-month warranty standard on rebuilt/reconditioned units
Warranty covers timing components, turbo, fuel system on relevant engines
Used engines: 3-6 month warranty typical, higher risk profile
Always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier before purchase
items.cta: Compare Nissan Pick Up engine warranty terms from UK specialists

items.question: What are common YD25DDT engine problems in Nissan Pick Up?
items.answer: Timing chain tensioner failure (OEM 15200-7S000) is the #1 issue, followed by turbocharger failure and injector seal leaks. Rebuilt units include upgraded tensioners to address the root cause.
keyPoints: Timing chain tensioner fails 80k-120k miles, causing chain rattle
Turbo failure (OEM 14500-75F0A) from oil starvation common
Injector seal leaks cause diesel contamination in oil
Rebuilt YD25DDT engines include upgraded tensioner as standard
items.cta: Get quotes for upgraded YD25DDT Nissan Pick Up engines

items.question: Does the YD25DDT use a timing belt or chain?
items.answer: The YD25DDT uses a TIMING CHAIN, not a belt. Chain tensioner failure is the known weak point - replacement engines include upgraded tensioners (OEM 15200-7S000) to prevent repeat failure.
keyPoints: YD25DDT has timing chain requiring no scheduled replacement
Tensioner (15200-7S000) failure causes chain slap and guide damage
Listen for rattling on cold start as early warning sign
Rebuilt units fit upgraded tensioner to eliminate known failure point
items.cta: Compare rebuilt YD25DDT engines with upgraded tensioners

items.question: What's the difference between D22 and D40 YD25DDT engines?
items.answer: YD25DDT engines differ significantly between D22 and D40 - ECU mapping, turbocharger specs, injectors and emissions systems are not directly compatible. Swapping requires full engine management adaptation.
keyPoints: D40 YD25DDT has different ECU programming and emissions hardware
Turbocharger and injector specs vary between generations
Direct swap not recommended without full management adaptation
Always match replacement engine to original vehicle generation
items.cta: Get quotes for generation-correct Nissan Pick Up YD25DDT engines

items.question: How much is labour for Nissan Pick Up engine removal and fitting?
items.answer: Labour typically costs £400-£700 for YD25DDT replacement, with D40 Navara potentially higher due to emissions system complexity. Supply & fit packages from £4,200 include all labour.
keyPoints: Standard D22 fit: £400-£600 labour typical
D40 Navara: £500-£700 due to emissions system complexity
Mobile fitting available nationwide for commercial vehicles
Supply & fit packages bundle engine + labour for simplified pricing
items.cta: Find Nissan Pick Up engine supply & fit deals nationwide

items.question: How quickly can I get a Nissan Pick Up engine delivered in the UK?
items.answer: Next-day delivery available on most YD25DDT engines to UK mainland. Rebuilt engines may require 3-5 days for custom specifications. Free UK mainland delivery standard on most orders.
keyPoints: Used/reconditioned engines: next-day delivery often available
Rebuilt engines: 3-5 days for custom specifications
Free UK mainland delivery standard on most supplier quotes
Scotland/NI may incur additional courier charges - confirm when ordering
